text.title: React Component Architecture Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the React Component Architecture methodology. Every rule pairs a binary check with sourced rationale, plus the universal skip-this-methodology gate.

rule.statement: Codebase MUST organise by feature folder (`features/<name>/`) holding `components/`, `hooks/`, `lib/`, `index.ts`; cross-cutting primitives live under `components/ui/` only.
rule.rationale: Feature folders keep blast radius local; technical folders (components / hooks / utils) scatter feature logic across the tree.

rule.statement: In Next.js app router, every component file MUST be implicitly server OR mark `'use client'` at the top; mixed boundary inside a single file is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Implicit client wrapping pulls server-only deps into the client bundle; explicit marker keeps the split auditable.

rule.statement: `components/ui/*` files MUST NOT import from `features/*` or call business APIs; primitives stay generic.
rule.rationale: Business leakage makes primitives reusable in name only and breaks every feature on a primitive edit.

rule.statement: React `Context` MUST only carry truly cross-tree state (theme, auth user, i18n, feature flags); feature state lives in feature-scoped stores (Zustand, jotai, or local state).
rule.rationale: Wide Context re-renders the entire subtree on any change; feature stores localise updates.

rule.statement: `useEffect` MUST only sync with external systems (subscriptions, manual DOM, history); deriving state from props or computing on render is forbidden inside an effect.

rationale.source: React 'You might not need useEffect' doc

rule.rationale: Effects for derivations cause double-render and stale-state bugs; render-time derivation is correct.

rule.statement: `memo`, `useMemo`, `useCallback` MUST only be applied where profiling shows render cost OR where reference identity is consumed by a memoised child; reflex-memoisation is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Blanket memoisation adds GC pressure and complexity without measurable benefit; the cost is real.

rule.statement: Pass props for ≤3 levels of drilling; switch to feature-scoped store at 4+ levels OR when ≥2 unrelated branches need the same data.
rule.rationale: Drilling beyond 3 levels signals a missing intermediate; arbitrary thresholds keep the architecture audit deterministic.

rule.statement: Apply this methodology only if all entries in `## Applies If` hold and none of `## Skip If` triggers; otherwise abort and route to the correct methodology.

rationale.source: F-066 spec - decision tree minimum form

rule.rationale: A misrouted methodology produces wrong-shape output; the explicit skip rule is the universal default branch from the decision tree.
